name: GIGABYTE B550 VISION D ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5200(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI - DisplayPort - Dual Intel LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - BT5.0
shortName: GIGABYTE B550 VISION D ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: Gigabyte B550 VISION D ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 4.0 slots and WiFi 6 for high-end builds.
